{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2021",
    "module": "es2022",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "outDir": "dist",
    "rootDir": "src",
    "sourceMap": true,
    "alwaysStrict": true,
    "useUnknownInCatchVariables": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

{
  "name": "servercn-drizzle-pg-starter",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "main": "dist/server.js",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "tsx --watch src/server.ts",
    "build": "tsc",
    "start": "node dist/server.js",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "drizzle-kit migrate",
    "db:studio": "drizzle-kit studio"
  },
  "devDependencies": {},
  "dependencies": {}
}

export default {
  extends: ["@commitlint/config-conventional"],
  rules: {
    "type-enum": [
      2,
      "always",
      [
        "feat",
        "fix",
        "docs",
        "style",
        "refactor",
        "test",
        "chore",
        "ci",
        "perf",
        "build",
        "release",
        "workflow",
        "security"
      ]
    ],

    "body-max-length": [0, "always", 500],
    "header-max-length": [0, "always", 200]
  }
};

{
  "singleQuote": false,
  "semi": true,
  "tabWidth": 2,
  "trailingComma": "none",
  "bracketSameLine": false,
  "arrowParens": "avoid",
  "endOfLine": "lf"
}

build

//? Export all schemas from schemas directory

export * from "./schemas/user.schema";
